examples: Freon exists both in liquid and gaseous states.
An antenna was not found inside, but a balloon with freon was there.
It's called freon. It's also used in air conditioners.
Freon itself is a global-warming gas (and ozone wrecker) that is slated to be outlawed worldwide by 2040.
Earlier this month, a 12-year-old San Bernardino County girl, Kristal Salcido, died after inhaling Freon from an air conditioner.
